rulings.Case Title: FRANCES SUSSNA VS. PRIME OLD COUNTY LP et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 1, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT PRIME OLD COUNTY LP, PRIME OLD COUNTY ACQUISITION LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden and presented evidence of executed Release of All Claims and a binding Settlement Agreement. No opposition filed. =(501/AB)

rulings.Case Title: NORMA ANN MULLIGAN VS. LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC.
